verdict_reasoning: HDAC6 is a cytoplasmic histone deacetylase and ring finger protein with no transmembrane domain, GPI anchor, or other membrane-anchoring mechanism. It functions as a soluble cytoplasmic enzyme deacetylating tubulin and other non-histone substrates. No isoform is membrane-anchored, no surface-directed therapeutic programs engage it on the cell surface, and no documented mechanism mediates transit to the outer face of the plasma membrane.
